items.headline: Pavel Dorofeyev returns, delivers overtime winner for Vegas Golden Knights in Game 5
items.description:
LAS VEGAS -- In the second period, he was hurt. Pavel Dorofeyev blocked a shot with a knee, crumpled to the ice and hobbled down the tunnel, disappearing into the Vegas Golden Knights dressing room with the help of a trainer.
In overtime, he was the hero. The forward batted

items.headline: Olen Zellweger showing Anaheim Ducks he belongs in lineup
items.description:
LAS VEGAS -- Olen Zellweger waited patiently for an opportunity to make an important contribution for the Anaheim Ducks in the 2026 Stanley Cup Playoffs.
Unfortunately for the 22-year-old defenseman, his tying goal late in the third period of Game 5 of the Western Conference Second Round on Tuesday did

items.headline: Anaheim Ducks Vegas Golden Knights Game 5 recap May 12, 2026
items.description: LAS VEGAS -- Pavel Dorofeyev scored his second goal of the game at 4:10 of overtime, and the Vegas Golden Knights defeated the Anaheim Ducks 3-2 in Game 5 of the Western Conference Second Round at T-Mobile Arena on Tuesday.

items.headline: Montreal Canadiens feel weight of ‘unlucky bounce’ in Game 4 loss
items.description:
MONTREAL -- It was a bizarre bounce that changed the game.
And, in the end, maybe the series.

items.headline: Ukko Pekka Luukkonen reclaims net for Sabres Game 4 win against Canadiens
items.description: MONTREAL – The last image of Ukko-Pekka Luukkonen, at least before Tuesday, saw the goalie’s head snap over his left shoulder, the puck already past him by the time his body moved. He stood up, turning toward the back of the net with the realization that his night was soon

items.headline: 2026 Stanley Cup Playoffs second round schedule television results
items.description: The second round of the 2026 Stanley Cup Playoffs are underway. Below is the complete schedule for all four best-of-7 series, including television and streaming information.

items.headline: Buffalo Sabres Montreal Canadiens Game 4 recap May 12 2026
items.description: MONTREAL -- Zach Benson scored the go-ahead goal on the power play early in the third period, and the Buffalo Sabres held on for a 3-2 win against the Montreal Canadiens in Game 4 of the Eastern Conference Second Round at Bell Centre on Tuesday.

items.headline: Carolina, Colorado defy age in 2026 playoffs
items.description: Legendary reporter Stan Fischler writes a weekly scrapbook for NHL. com. Also known as "The Hockey Maven," he blends insight and humor for readers every Wednesday. This week examines the past and present success of older teams like the Carolina Hurricanes and Colorado Avalanche. Punch Imlach's 1967 Toronto Maple Leafs

items.headline: Carolina Hurricanes taking advantage of break leading up to Eastern Conference Final
items.description: RALEIGH, N.C. -- The Carolina Hurricanes returned to practice on Tuesday, three days after a four-game sweep of their Eastern Conference Second Round series against the Philadelphia Flyers. No one reaped the benefits of the short series more than coach Rod Brind’Amour.

items.headline: Celebrities sports stars attend NHL Stanley Cup Playoffs
items.description:
The puck has dropped on the 2026 Stanley Cup playoffs. Celebrities from the sports and entertainment worlds are taking in all the action. Check out what famous faces have been spotted in the stands.

items.headline: Raiders Kirk Cousins cranks Vegas Golden Knights siren Game 5
items.description:
Kirk Cousins likes hyping up his new city.
The Las Vegas Raiders quarterback cranked the siren before Game 5 of the Western Conference Second Round between the Vegas Golden Knights and Anaheim Ducks at T-Mobile Arena on Tuesday.
In a video posted by the team, Cousins sported a custom Golden

items.headline: Start times for Stanley Cup Playoff games on May 16 announced
items.description:
NEW YORK – The National Hockey League today announced the following updates to the 2026 Stanley Cup Playoffs Second Round schedule:

items.headline: Guy Carbonneau Montreal Canadiens lights torch Game 4
items.description:
Habs fans, the captain is back.
Guy Carbonneau — who captained the 1993 Montreal Canadiens Stanley Cup championship team — lit the torch at Bell Centre on Tuesday to kick off the festivities before Game 4 of the Eastern Conference Second Round against the Buffalo Sabres.

items.headline: Ukko-Pekka Luukkonen to start in goal for Buffalo in Game 4 of Eastern 2nd Round
items.description:
MONTREAL -- Ukko-Pekka Luukkonen started for the Buffalo Sabres in Game 4 of the Eastern Conference Second Round against the Montreal Canadiens at Bell Centre on Tuesday.
The goalie had backed up Alex Lyon the past seven games after being pulled 16 seconds into the third period of a 4-2

items.headline: Charlie McAvoy suspended six regular-season games for actions in Boston Bruins game
items.description:
NEW YORK -- Boston Bruins defenseman Charlie McAvoy has been suspended for six regular-season games, without pay, for slashing Buffalo Sabres forward Zach Benson during Game 6 of the teams’ First Round series in Boston on Friday, May 1, the National Hockey League’s Department of Player Safety announced today.
